fallback_questions.a: It’s a Medicare Advantage vs Medigap decision-support tool that explains tradeoffs, estimates risk style, and highlights what would change the recommendation.

fallback_questions.q: Does this app collect or send my data?
fallback_questions.a: No. It’s designed for local-only use. Inputs stay on your device unless you manually share/export something.

fallback_questions.q: What are the biggest drivers behind the recommendation?
fallback_questions.a: Typically: premium vs out-of-pocket risk tolerance, provider/network dependence, medication risk, and the ability to pass underwriting later (Medigap switching asymmetry).
A 6-month window starting the first month you’re 65+ and enrolled in Part B (generally the best time to buy Medigap without medical underwriting in many situations).
AEP is Oct 15–Dec 7 (annual changes). MA-OEP is Jan 1–Mar 31 (one switch for people already in MA).

fallback_questions.q: How should I use the uncertainty output?
fallback_questions.a: Treat it like a ‘confidence + sensitivity’ indicator: if uncertainty is high, focus on verifying the few top drivers and rerun scenarios (best/median/worst).
